entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop (Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench) used as samples for protein and lysine analysis

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutritional component of sorghum analyzed using TAA and micro-Kjeldahl methods

entities.description: A rapid method used for estimating protein content in sorghum samples

entities.name: MICRO-KJELDAHL METHOD
entities.description: A standard method used to compare and validate the protein estimation of the TAA method

entities.name: LYSINE
entities.description: An essential amino acid in sorghum analyzed using DBC and amino-acid analyzer

entities.name: DYE-BINDING CAPACITY
entities.description: A rapid procedure used for estimating lysine content in sorghum

entities.name: AMINO-ACID ANALYZER
entities.description: A method used to determine lysine content and validate the DBC procedure
